summary: Phase 1.6 rules-based listing generation: deterministic generateProductDraft with manual form, URL stub, and opportunity card extraction; compliance checks; readiness scoring; export guard. No LLM or API calls.

interfaceChanges.description: Builds ProductDraft from ListingGenerationContext (manual_form, url_stub, opportunity_card).
Returns false when compliance is blocked or draft not ready_for_export.

mappings.criterion: generateProductDraft module under listing workflow with documented input context type
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_rules_engine.test.ts::generateProductDraft module has no cloud LLM and no API calls in the public entrypoint

mappings.criterion: manual form input produces complete product_info and listing_content fields via rules
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_rules_engine.test.ts::manual form input produces complete product_info and listing_content with ready_for_export status

mappings.criterion: URL stub input produces deterministic field extraction without live fetch
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_rules_engine.test.ts::extracts product name and category hints without live fetch

mappings.criterion: opportunity card context pre-fills draft from selected opportunity and distributor
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_rules_engine.test.ts::pre-fills draft from opportunity and distributor context

mappings.criterion: blocked category sets compliance status blocked and denies export
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_rules_engine.test.ts::blocks export when category is on the blocklist
web/src/__tests__/test_listing_rules_engine.test.ts::adds a blocking issue when price is missing or zero

mappings.criterion: complete valid input yields ready_for_export and readiness score at or above threshold
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_rules_engine.test.ts::manual form input produces complete product_info and listing_content with ready_for_export status

mappings.criterion: same input twice produces identical draft
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_rules_engine.test.ts::produces identical drafts for the same input context

mappings.criterion: readiness score at or above documented threshold for complete manual form input
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_rules_engine.test.ts::manual form input produces complete product_info and listing_content with ready_for_export status

mappings.criterion: no cloud LLM and no API calls
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_rules_engine.test.ts::generateProductDraft module has no cloud LLM and no API calls in the public entrypoint
